overview: A premium ICP Casino with gold and purple Vegas-inspired styling. Features 13+ casino games with realistic 3D-like visuals, slot machines, PvP Versus Mode, live chat, and Plug wallet integration for real ICP betting.
features: Premium 3D-like game assets with depth, shadows, and realistic textures
Glassmorphism UI effects on game cards with cinematic hover interactions
Advanced slot machines: Lucky Sevens and Midnight Dragons 8x8 grid
PvP Versus Mode with chess, dice, rock-paper-scissors and live ICP wagering
Plug wallet integration for real ICP bets and balance tracking
Premium typography with Montserrat and smooth CSS micro-transitions
Live lobby chat and transaction history
Featured game carousel with smooth animations
